step_rationale: Mitochondrial redox cofactor; depletion reflects statin toxicity and energy stress post-STEMI.
mechanism: CoQ10 depletion after STEMI impairs myocardial mitochondrial ATP production and antioxidant defense, worsening ischemic injury.

references.title: Newly Initiated Statin Treatment Is Associated with Decreased Plasma Coenzyme Q10 Level After Acute ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction.

trials.title: Assessing the Effect of the Dietary Supplement Coenzyme Q10 on Biomarkers of Oxidative Stress, Systemic Inflammation, and Endothelial Function in Hemodialysis Patients
Coenzyme Q10 in Relation to the Antioxidative Vitamins, Oxidative Stress and Inflammation in Coronary Artery Disease Patients During Statin Therapy
